name: All Tyler The Creator Alter Egos
description:
| ○ | going on vacation with all the alter egos

°❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:･°❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:･

Scenario: It was decided by all the roommates that a vacation was needed. But of course with all nine men, chaos ensued in the van.

Notes: Requested by ‘st4r_st7l3’!! Salem isn’t written in, just the alter egos.

Snippet: “Igor was sat in the very back row of the car, alongside Chroma. Igor and Chroma got the whole row to themselves because everybody knew Chroma would freak out if he had to be crammed in the back with everyone else. Chroma and Igor couldn’t even see what was going on, nor hear what was going on because of Chur Bum’s booming laughter.”

Warning(s): None hehe
